gloss.en: a stone marking a grave

gloss.en: the force that pulls objects toward each other

gloss.en: the quality of being great

words.example: History will judge his greatness.

gloss.en: a glass building for growing plants

words.example: She grows tomatoes in the greenhouse.

gloss.en: to feel deep sadness, especially over a death

gloss.en: increasing in size, amount, or degree

gloss.en: courage and determination

gloss.en: relating to gymnastics or body exercises

gloss.en: not able to cause damage or injury

gloss.en: the act of doing something very quickly

gloss.en: beautiful or sad in a way hard to forget

gloss.en: causing great sadness

words.example: They shared a heartwarming reunion.

gloss.en: for this reason

words.example: The factory uses high-tech machines.

gloss.en: the act or way of holding something

words.example: He acted in an honourable way.

gloss.en: a part of a coat that covers the head

gloss.en: kind and showing care for others
